00030 /*
00031  * Attachment code for having the generic random device use the LAMEbus
00032  * random device.
00033  */
00034 
00035 #include <types.h>
00036 #include <lib.h>
00037 #include <generic/random.h>
00038 #include <lamebus/lrandom.h>
00039 #include "autoconf.h"
00040 
00041 struct random_softc *
00042 attach_random_to_lrandom(int randomno, struct lrandom_softc *ls)
00043 {
00044         struct random_softc *rs = kmalloc(sizeof(struct random_softc));
00045         if (rs==NULL) {
00046                 return NULL;
00047         }
00048 
00049         (void)randomno;  // unused
00050 
00051         rs->rs_devdata = ls;
00052         rs->rs_random = lrandom_random;
00053         rs->rs_randmax = lrandom_randmax;
00054         rs->rs_read = lrandom_read;
00055 
00056         return rs;
00057 }
